scheme_name: Subsidy for Developing Business Premises for Persons with Disabilities
page_title: Subsidy for Developing Business Premises for Persons with Disabilities

details: The scheme "Subsidy for Developing Business Premises for Persons with Disabilities" is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, loans up to ₹3 lakh are provided to persons with disabilities to develop business premises on their own land and start self-employment activities. Permanent residents of Haryana, aged 18 or older, with a disability of 40% or more, is eligible to avail the benefits under this scheme.
benefits: Under this scheme, loans up to ₹3 lakh are provided to persons with disabilities to develop business premises on their own land and start self-employment activities.
eligibility: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Haryana.
The applicant should have a disability of at least 40%.
The applicant should be over 18 years old. For persons with mental retardation, the age requirement is relaxed to 14 years instead of the usual 18 years.

The land on which commercial/business complexes are proposed to be constructed should be the applicant's own or it should be on long term lease for more than 20 years from a government agency. The lease period should be 20 years on the date of application to N.H.F.D.C.

online: Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal:
Step 01:
The eligible applicant may apply online through the Official Portal- Antyodaya-SARAL Portal.
https://saralharyana.gov.in/
Step 02:
If the applicant is not registered on the portal, he/she gets registered there.
Step 03:
For registration, click “
New User
” under ‘Sign In Here’ and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number, Password & State. Click on ‘Submit’.
Step 04:
Verify your mobile number and email ID through the received OTP and complete the registration process.
Login to apply for the scheme:
To avail the benefits of the scheme, visit the Official
Antyodaya-SARAL Portal
and log in through the email ID used while registering.
Enter Password & Captcha and click on ‘Login’.
After successful login, click on ‘Apply for Services’ and then ‘View all Available Services’
Now, you can search for the scheme and click on the scheme to go ahead and fill out the application form.
Step 05:
Fill in all the mandatory details and upload all the mandatory documents.
Step 06:
Preview the application form and click on ‘Submit’.
Tracking of Application:
Applicants can track their applications through the Official
by entering their Department Name, Scheme Name, and Application Reference ID.

documents_required: 1. Identity/Citizenship Proof (Any one of the following):
2. Age Proof (Any one of the following):
3. Resident Proof/Address Proof/Ownership Proof (Any one of the following):
4. Caste/Religion Proof (Any one of the following):
5. Disability Proof (Any one of the following):
• Disability Certificate (Disability should not be less than 40%)

faqs.question: What is the maximum loan amount available under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The maximum loan amount available under this scheme is ₹3 lakh.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Permanent residents of Haryana aged 18 or older, with a disability of 40% or more, are eligible to apply. For persons with mental retardation, the age requirement is 14 years.

faqs.question: Is there an age relaxation for persons with mental retardation?
faqs.answer: Yes, for persons with mental retardation, the age requirement is relaxed to 14 years instead of the usual 18 years.

faqs.question: What type of land can be used for constructing business premises under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The land should be the applicant's own or on a long-term lease for more than 20 years from a government agency.

faqs.question: How can one apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Eligible applicants can apply online through the Official Antyodaya-SARAL Portal at https://saralharyana.gov.in/.

faqs.question: Can applicants track their application status?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants can track their applications through the Official Antyodaya-SARAL Portal by entering their Department Name, Scheme Name, and Application Reference ID at https://status.saralharyana.nic.in/.

faqs.question: Can persons with temporary disabilities apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: No, only persons with a permanent disability of at least 40% are eligible.
